title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Key Winners
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, with several major films and television shows dominating the winners' circle. In film, Hamnet directed by Chloé Zhao claimed the top prize in Best Motion Picture Drama. Paul Thomas Anderson's One Battle After Another secured Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy, along with three additional Golden Globes including Best Director and Best Screenplay. Ryan Coogler's Sinners won the Box Office Achievement category while also taking home Best Original Score. KPop Demon Hunters emerged victorious in Best Animated Feature. In television, The Pitt claimed Best TV Drama Series, with Noah Wyle winning Best Performance by a Male Actor in a TV Series Drama. The Studio featuring Seth Rogen won Best TV Comedy Series, with Rogen taking home the acting prize in his category. Adolescence secured Best Limited Series and garnered four total Golden Globes throughout the night. Standout performances recognized included Jessie Buckley for drama actress in Hamnet, Timothée Chalamet for musical/comedy actor in Marty Supreme, and Jean Smart for TV comedy actress in Hacks.
